/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/check_gbe.dir/check_gbe.c.o -o check_gbe   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/check/0.15.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/check/0.15.2/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2_ttf/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib ../lib/libemu.a -lcheck /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2_ttf/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib
